（穿越+综漫+爽文+慢热+游戏系统+升级流+Happy end）
这是一个资深创批带着游戏中的装备和技能前往各个世界体验人生的故事。
本作品是源于个人兴趣的创作，所有的构思和落笔皆因对地下城和二次元的热爱，部分设定借鉴了网络游戏《地下城与勇士 创新世纪》。
本作将喜爱的动漫与游戏设定进行融合重构，希望能为同样喜爱这两类作品的读者，带来一段兼具熟悉感与新鲜感的奇幻冒险。

t":0,"listen_duration":1141,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2027,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5089},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1760707761,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7564100454802359065","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"只看过动漫，非常不爽里面畏畏缩缩的日本人样子，不过世界观和人物表现很好。写的非常棒，用生产力发展的思路解决来解决现实问题，特别是有魔法这种不讲理技术，直接就是降维打击。就像你是一个宇航文明的掌控者，去到了宋朝或者明朝。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761162872,"group_id":"7546538088286129176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxRFjXA50uhhkEDsDm9O434=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"74781575245","user_name":"嘀！重启的二维生活"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"74781575245","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776816289,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546538088286129176","book_info":{"abstract":" nt":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8499,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":13346},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1761174664,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7569532109045580568","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"补充一下[偷笑]姑妄言之罢了。
个人最喜欢的情节还是那段修建横贯魔大陆的大路，比原著的主角有更大的格局，移山填海看着也非常爽，甚至在这一方面超越了原著。
同时，幼年期跟洛琪希的感情戏也不错，我自己觉得比原著那宅味的幻想/行为好很多。跟爱丽丝，希露菲的感情倒是中规中矩，可能跟她们的剧情比较“雷同”（跟原著比差别不太大）。
总之，作者加油捏，适当的拓展也是综漫的看点之一，希望后续的世界[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762421112,"group_id":"7546538088286129176","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1922407767216621"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546538088286129176","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"122"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3875,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7569432868755505944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，自己感觉可能被书名耽误了一点流量（不是），毕竟刚开始看到这个“创批”就觉得莫名其妙（个人不玩dnf）[偷笑]。
魂穿鲁迪后的性格蛮对我胃口，实力上来了，该不吃牛肉就不吃牛肉，莫名其妙的扮猪吃虎不多就很爽。","text_exts":[{"e":101,"s":97,"text":"扮猪吃虎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%99%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774251681F87FC838%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227569432868755505944%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227546538088286129176%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%99%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762398749,"group_id":"7546538088286129176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NygviCg6qDgdfTmXCMvGNYR2YeSc7cpN628jWcpI93In","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fc66130edb9e4cbfae68bd304563e9c2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795223&x-signature=ySOnK9p%2FyOkBHx6bJPvLPy0mHXs%3D","user_id":"1922407767216621","user_name":"YYYYuyuko~"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1922407767216621","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546538088286129176","book_info":{"abstract":"别名 无职：你的空间？这是我的宇宙！
